emails.subject: Re: Wharton Tiger team #3
emails.body: I have reserved conference room 32C2 for Thursday, Feb 1, Feb 8, and Feb 15 from 3:30 5:30 John to teleconference in tomorrow (Feb 1) call 713-853-9554 Please let me know if Wharton is using a different number from last week so that I can inform the scheduling people Melinda x31641 Christie Patrick@ECT 01/30/2001 06:34 PM
